titleStmt.title: SII 35.137: original edition by D. M. Nagaraju
No. 137. (A.R. No. 73 of 1951-52.) ABLŪR, KOD TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

summary.p: Stone (No. II) set up in the Grāmadēvata temple.

This portion of a broken and damaged record seems to contain the description of a family of governors. Mentions Kāmadēva, Prabhu-Malla, Māyidēva and Māchidēva. Mahādēvadaṇḍa-nāyaka, the mahapradhāna, Paṭṭa-Sāhani and commender of forces was governing a province [name lost].

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
gaḷaṁkusa
sahitaṁ śrī manmahāmaṇḍaḷēsvara
diṁdiḷisi nimi¨rdduni
yyadaḍame
ndupete
du divasaṁ śrīmadbanava
matiśaya prañanuta
ya nikhirā¨rtthiprātthana sirayya
yadāyakanumenisi yada
rāsivēḷāntadeṁduṁ jayate bannama mahadēvadaṇḍadinātha
prātnallapaṁteruhanani ni¨rmaḷa
ḷahāsa camūpatiya prabhāva metenduḍeṁ
daneṁbudiṁdu bareyisi nuḍiyi
priyaputra mahādēvadaṇḍēśvarana pratāpameṁte
hara bhūlōdūtani sāmānya pratāpa
catura rājamahāranu sujana dēvana
gaṁ tāneneleya śrīmahāmaṇḍaḷēśvara vritta
sarōjaḷaṁ jagadaponallaḷiṁ baḷadu ka si¨rppa Avaḷi baḷigoṁdu banava
tiḷakami¨rppatisyamahapa ṇaṁvini¨rjita barihara madaṟa viḷāsa
ḷa kaḷasakaṁca manūjana vacana . tripurārige
svadēśanānu sāriga menita nakkanuva manesaṁdigūppuva mūṟa
haṁ maṁgaḷenatisuvara duṣṭanigraha viśiṣṭa pratipāḷisida śrī manmahāpradānataratuyya paṭṭasāhaṇi sēnā
dhikāri śrīmanmahādēvadaṇḍanāyaka sukhasaṁkathā vinōdadiṁ rājyaṁgeyyuttiralu mukhigidā
nidhinijavadhupadmāvatidēviyattikeṁdoḷu pū¨rthvilakṣmīdvēyoḷa kritanuḷariya tī¨rthanānāntadoḷu baḷavi janavinuta mayidēva
Anupama tējanaprati makkaḷu mahījanudātagita nātanakanu nū¨rjjitayaśaṁ jana janamapanahatīdravadanaṁ catura
nanenippamahōnnati kāmadēvanasarasāṁgi Aśvavidyādaritattanu kaḷanu cala ṇādhibhava lakṣmīyanipa mēlvāṇi puruṣōttamuṁ tāne
patiya pradānya caturu padhānasaṁkhada caturāṁ bhūrāsiviḷasitō jaḷaka yaśa chaturānana paḍuvākyaṁcaturūbita latyana¨rtti rājama
laṁ parōpakāri caturaṁnū¨rjitaṁ puṇyakaranamaḷa kī¨rtti bāsura lōka māreya vriti
trava pratihaṁtaṁ prabhumalla tyapūjyenu parahita cāri nukī¨rtthayāsmita mati mārakhirinanaguṁ nijamaṁtrade ma
kṣaṁgaḷa guṇnotiyaṁteṁdūḍe . vritta . surata gaḍigitiyeṁbudu dāniya saragūruveṁbudu pratima maṁtrade sannū satataḷa
gaḷinirataraṁdareda bhumikarājanapū¨rrvavaṁ nobhanenātta tējana . viduvimaḷa caritrā bhūnidhidejanatpujya nakhiḷaguṇa
ratpakkanigidapa banuselegila Ādhikayaśaṁ ca
taraṇadiṁbuda praratiḷiṭṭa manū¨rjjitamaṁ traiśaktiyiṁ patigesamriddha rājyabhāramaṁbhuja vikramadiṁda duṣṭabhūpatige beriyaṁ nijadēva¨rddhisada
no¨rjita yaśaṁ salepadmarasi dharitriyoḷu . vritta . saka kavidra stuta raṇaṁ sujanāgraṇi śiṣṭadyayadu karavaiyana pratimāśū
ra bhujanujvaḷa yaśōvibhuvamanu . vrittiḥ . sadguṇa karanakhiḷūnnaka taṁ sūvarasa sarasūkti bhūṣaṇaṁ . mattamā camūpatiya samīpava¨rtti
guṇaprabhāvameṁteṁdaḍe . kanda . śrīvanitetānevijayaśrīvadhu tānāgibamsabhūpanasatitāvadhu mahādēvi guṇavaḷiya
vottuṁ muḍivūttu peṇbarijanantā pāḷanageydu kāmaḷeyamāḷaladēvi vairi baḷedu ni¨rmūḷanaṁ mā¨rppatūḷbaladoḷu
viḷasajjaṁgama kalpavallariyanalu vikhyātiyaṁ tāḷdidaḷu . kanda . Udisidanava¨rgge putraṁviditayaśaṁ māyidēva ca
navanipāḷaka tiḷaka . Ātana tanūja . kanda . śrīramaṇanāgi vīraśrīśēkara te hā sakītti ya
svasti samastapraśastisahitaṁ śrīmanmahāmaṇḍaḷēśvaraṁ . trikuṁdapurada
sāda . parōpakāra vinōdaṁ śrīmatumācidēvana priyaputranappa
riyara saphaḷa śrīmatu
Digital edition of SII 35.137 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
